steps.title: Identify the transition type needed
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that poisonous amphibians safely migrate during the day. The second sentence explains the mechanism—their warning colors protect them from daytime predators. The strongest signal is the shift from stating a fact to explaining how it works.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content: ”At that time” (choice B) means “in that situation” or “in those circumstances,” linking the daytime context stated in the first sentence to the logical explanation about how the amphibians survive in daylight. The other three fail: “However” signals a contradiction rather than an explanation, “In other words” restates the idea instead of explaining it, and “For example” introduces examples instead of mechanism. That matches choice B — B is correct.
